endpoints.title: Get device list
endpoints.description: Obtain the list of inverters owned by this account    ``` {   "currentPage": 1,   "pageSize": 10 } ```

headers.name: token
headers.description: Generate apikey from the API management function of the platform

headers.name: signature
headers.description: Signature rule: Encrypt the string url + "\r\n" + token + "\r\n" + timestamp with md5

headers.name: timestamp
headers.description: Current timestamp

headers.name: lang
headers.description: Language

body.name: pageSize
body.description: The amount of data presented per page

fields.name: errno
fields.description: Error number（When the result is not equal to zero, the request fails）

fields.description: The amount of data presented per page

fields.name: ├─ moduleSN

fields.name: ├─ hasPV

endpoints.title: Get device real-time data (Deprecated)
endpoints.description: Get the latest real-time data of the inverter, and get the real-time data of all devices under the name without specifying the SN    ``` {   "sn": "***************",   "variables": ["pvPower","pv1Current"] } ```

headers.name: token
headers.description: Generate apikey from the API management function of the platform

headers.name: signature
headers.description: Signature rule: Encrypt the string url + "\r\n" + token + "\r\n" + timestamp with md5

headers.name: timestamp
headers.description: Current timestamp

headers.name: lang
headers.description: Language

body.name: variables
body.description: If this parameter is not passed, all variable data is obtained by default item type: string
Variable name Available variables can be queried through the Get Variables interface Remark:Variable name,available variables can be queried through the Get Variables interface

body.name: sn
body.description: Serial Number of Inverter If no parameter is specified, all devices are obtained

fields.name: ├─ variable
fields.description: Variable name If the data is not found, it will not be returned

fields.name: ├─ time
fields.description: Time of Data Update, utc time

endpoints.title: Get device history data
endpoints.description: The historical data within the specified 24 hours can be obtained（The begin time and end time are required). If no time period is specified, you can obtain the historical data of the last three days.    ``` {   "sn": "***************",   "variables": ["pvPower","pv1Current"],   "begin": 1703548800000,   "end": 1703635200000 } ```

body.description: If this parameter is not passed, all variable data is obtained by default
Variable name Available variables can be queried through the Get Variables interface Remark:Variable name,available variables can be queried through the Get Variables interface

fields.name: ├─ time
fields.description: Time of Data Update, utc time

endpoints.title: Get device production report
endpoints.description: Obtain the inverter electricity consumption report. Calculated according to the time zone of the power station to which the inverter belongs.The monthly electricity consumption of the year is obtained, the daily electricity consumption of the month is obtained, and the hourly electricity consumption of the day is obtained    ``` {   "sn": "***************",   "year": 2023,   "month": 10,   "day": 3,   "dimension": "day",   "variables": ["generation","feedin","gridConsumption","chargeEnergyToTal","dischargeEnergyToTal","PVEnergyTotal"] } {   "sn": "***************",   "year": 2023,   "month": 10,   "dimension": "month",   "variables": ["generation","feedin","gridConsumption","chargeEnergyToTal","dischargeEnergyToTal","PVEnergyTotal"] } {   "sn": "***************",   "year": 2023,   "dimension": "year",   "variables": ["generation","feedin","gridConsumption","chargeEnergyToTal","dischargeEnergyToTal"] } ```

endpoints.title: Set the battery charging time
endpoints.description: Set the battery charging time. The period must be two periods. Both periods must be delivered   request body : ``` {   "sn": "sn_4e50c9b8a5c3",   "enable1": false,   "enable2": false,   "startTime1": {     "hour": 0,     "minute": 0   },   "endTime1": {     "hour": 0,     "minute": 0   },   "startTime2": {     "hour": 0,     "minute": 0   },   "endTime2": {     "hour": 0,     "minute": 0   } } ```

"value": "10"               },               {                   "unit": "",                   "precision": 1.0,                   "name": "maxStartTemperatureRange",                   "value": "9" 0.0,                       "max": 23.0                   },                   "value": "0"               },               {                   "unit": "",                   "precision": 1.0,                   "name": "time1EndMinute",                   "range": {                       "min": 0.0,                       "max": 59.0                   },                   "value": "0"               },               {                   "unit": "",                   "precision": 1.0,                   "name": "time3StartHour",                   "range": {                       "min": 0.0,                       "max": 23.0                   },                   "value": "0"               },               {                   "unit": "",                   "precision": 1.0,                   "name": "minStartTemperatureRange",                   "value": "1"               },               {                   "enumList": [                       "disable",                       "enable"                   ],                   "unit": "℃",                   "precision": 1.0,                   "name": "time2Enable",                   "value": "disable"               },               {                   "enumList": [                       "disable",                       "enable"                   ],                   "unit": "",                   "precision": 1.0,                   "name": "batteryWarmUpFunctionEnableFlag",                   "value": "disable"               },               {                   "unit": "",                   "precision": 1.0,                   "name": "time3EndMinute",                   "range": {                       "min": 0.0,                       "max": 59.0                   },                   "value": "0"               },               {                   "unit": "",                   "precision": 1.0,                   "name": "time2EndHour",                   "range": {                 "value": "disable"               },               {                   "unit": "",                   "precision": 1.0,                   "name": "time1StartHour",                   "range": {                       "min": 0.0,                       "max": 23.0                   },                   "value": "0"               },               {                   "unit": "℃",                   "precision": 1.0,                   "name": "startTemperature",                   "value": "1"               },               {                   "enumList": [                       "disable",                       "enable"                   ],                   "unit": "",                   "precision": 1.0,                   "name": "time1Enable",                   "value": "disable"               },               {                   "enumList": [                       "disable",                       "enable"                   ],                   "unit": "", "value": "0"               },               {                   "unit": "",                   "precision": 1.0,                   "name": "maxEndTemperatureRange",                   "value": "15" stopped warm up state",                       "The battery is in a ready warm up state",                       "The battery is in the warm up state",                       "Battery is in self warm up
